category_title: Elementary students with ASD who engage in head-banging and arm-biting during transitions and independent work
minimal_context: Jake is sitting at his desk to complete a worksheet during independent work time.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Jake, it is time for independent work. Please sit at your desk and finish this worksheet while I go work with the other group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Jake sits at his desk but does not start the worksheet, remaining unoccupied.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep working on your paper, Jake.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Jake looks away from the paper, sitting alone and completely unoccupied at his desk.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just do your best on it.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Jake begins engaging in self-injurious behavior at his desk, specifically head-banging and biting his arms, causing physical injury.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Jake, it is time for independent work. Please sit at your desk and finish this worksheet while I go work with the other group.

STUDENT: (Jake sits at his desk but does not start the worksheet, remaining unoccupied.)

TUTOR: Keep working on your paper, Jake.

STUDENT: (Jake looks away from the paper, sitting alone and completely unoccupied at his desk.)

TUTOR: Just do your best on it.

STUDENT: (Jake begins engaging in self-injurious behavior at his desk, specifically head-banging and biting his arms, causing physical injury.)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When Jake is unoccupied or left alone
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Engaging in SIB at school, specifically head-banging and biting his arms, causing physical injury
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Behavior may be reinforced by sensory stimulation (automatic reinforcement) rather than social factors

behavior_patterns.condition: During independent work and transition periods
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Engaging in SIB at school, specifically head-banging and biting his arms
